ksa_text: Track compliance remediation activities through closure, monitoring milestones and action completion, escalating blockers, maintaining remediation plans with documented evidence, and ensuring verified closure of findings.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-005 (RC, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4275 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.427, dcwf=0.415, nice=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4275 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-T-005 (composite 0.4275) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4275 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4275 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4275, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
